3\. Just mute the set and check that no voice is heard,and unmute it and check
the conversation is ok

When we unmute correct level of audio is expected

entries.title: N_20_AUD_320_Audio-Mode_Commutation_Phases
entries.raw_action:
1\. Set the required CODEC on the PABX configurator.  
2\. Initiate a communication between the set under evaluation in handset-mode
and a distant set (IP,UA, or Z)in handset mode .
entries.raw_expected_result:
1. Every time you switch from one audio mode to an other, pay attention to the
audio quality during the transition phase:  
  
\- no unpleasant switching noise should be heard.  
-no echo should be heard.  
-no distorsion of the distant's voice should be heard.  
  
On evaluation side and on distant side.
entries.normalized_action: Set the required CODEC on the PABX configurator.
